short: Alibaba's model family and team behind the open-weight Qwen language and multimodal models.
definition: Alibaba Qwen is the model family and research team at Alibaba responsible for the Qwen series. It has released a broad range of open-weight language, multimodal (text plus images or other media), and coding models across many sizes. Because the weights are openly available, Qwen models are widely used as bases for fine-tuning across the open AI ecosystem.
